description: Add control points to faces. Control points are added on all faces in the current building blocks set if < range > is not supplied.
notes: Requires a current building-blocks set: run 'building-blocks set create <name>' then 'building-blocks set select <name>' before any block/edge/face/point operation; otherwise FLAC rejects the command with 'Unused extra parameter'.

keywords.name: count
keywords.description: Bare positional integer. Add exactly i X i control points (grid) per each face ( i must be a positive integer 0,2,3,…,20). Added control points will be evenly spaced. Also will add i CPs per each internal edge from the list of the faces. If i = 0 control points are removed.

keywords.name: no-edges-cp
keywords.description: Optional. Skip adding-removing CPs to-from edges.
